member.summary: Generates all possible AI actions for evaluation.

member.summary: Generates all possible actions the AI could take this turn.
member.param: Current state of the battle for context.
member.returns: List of potential AI decisions with associated scores.

member.summary: Generates all possible offensive actions against a specific target.
member.returns: List of possible offensive actions.

member.summary: Generates all possible support actions for an ally.
member.returns: List of possible support actions.

member.summary: Generates defensive/positioning actions like retreating or repositioning.
member.returns: List of possible defensive actions.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator
member.summary: Evaluates and scores AI actions and targets.

member.summary: Evaluates the value of an offensive action.
member.param: Position attacker will be in when using skill.
Whether this action requires movement first.
member.returns: Score representing the value of this action.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.EvaluateSupportAction(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem,Godot.Vector3I,Godot.Vector3I,AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Evaluates the value of a support action.
member.param: Position caster will be in when using skill.
Whether this action requires movement first.
member.returns: Score representing the value of this action.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.EvaluateDefensiveAction(Godot.Vector3I,Godot.Vector3I,AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState)
member.summary: Evaluates the value of a defensive/retreat action.
member.returns: Score representing the value of this action.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.ScoreTarget(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState)
member.summary: Scores a potential target based on distance, health, and threat level. Higher score means more desirable to target.
member.returns: A float score representing the desirability of targeting this unit.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.ScoreSkill(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState)
member.summary: Scores a skill based on its effectiveness against the target and current battle state. Higher score means more desirable to use.
member.returns: A float score representing the desirability of using the skill.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.ScoreDamageSkill(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem)
member.summary: Scores a damage-dealing skill based on target's health and resistances.
member.returns: A float score representing the desirability of using the damage skill.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.ScoreHealSkill(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState)
member.summary: Scores a healing skill based on the most damaged ally's health.
member.returns: A float score representing the desirability of using the healing skill.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.ScoreBuffSkill(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState)
member.summary: Scores a buff skill based on current battle state.
member.returns: A float score representing the desirability of using the buff skill.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.ScoreDebuffSkill(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem)
member.summary: Scores a debuff or control skill based on target threat level.
member.returns: A float score representing the desirability of using the debuff/control skill.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.GetPersonalitySkillMultiplier(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem)
member.summary: Gets a personality-based multiplier for skill scoring.
member.returns: A float multiplier to adjust skill score.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator.CountTargetsInAOE(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState)
member.summary: Counts how many units would be affected by the skill's area of effect.
member.returns: The number of units affected by the skill's AOE.

member.summary: Scores a potential position based on distance to target, terrain, and tactical considerations.
member.param: The range of the skill to get within.
member.returns: The score for the given position.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIPersonality
member.summary: Defines different AI personality types that determine decision-making behavior.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIPersonality.Aggressive
member.summary: Attacks the nearest target, prefers close combat.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIPersonality.Opportunistic
member.summary: Targets weakest enemies, tries to finish off low HP units.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIPersonality.Defensive
member.summary: Maintains distance, avoids direct combat when possible.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIPersonality.Balanced
member.summary: Balances offense and positioning, adapts to situation.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIAction
member.summary: Represents the types of actions an AI can take.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIAction.MoveAndSkill
member.summary: Move to a new position then use a skill.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIAction.Move
member.summary: Move to a new position only.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIAction.UseSkill
member.summary: Use a skill or ability without moving.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIAction.Pass
member.summary: Do nothing and end turn.

member.summary: The action to perform.

member.summary: The target unit (for attacks or skills).

member.summary: The position to move to (for movement).

member.name: P:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIDecision.Skill
member.summary: The skill to use (for skill actions).

member.summary: The evaluation score for this decision. Higher is better.

member.name: P:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIDecision.Reasoning
member.summary: Debug description of why this decision was scored this way.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.EnemyAIBehavior
member.summary: Base class for enemy AI behaviors. Attach this as a child node to enemy UnitSystem nodes. Encapsulates decision-making logic for a single enemy unit.
member.remarks: This component pattern allows each enemy to have customized AI behavior without modifying the core UnitSystem class. The AI makes decisions based on the current BattleState and executes actions through the GameManager.

member.name: P:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.EnemyAIBehavior.Unit
member.summary: Read-only access to the UnitSystem this AI is attached to. Useful for external systems that need to query the AI's unit.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.EnemyAIBehavior.ExecuteTurn(AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState)
member.summary: Executes the AI's turn logic based on the current battle state.
member.param: Snapshot of the current battle situation.
member.returns: A task that completes when the AI has finished its turn.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.EnemyAIBehavior.MakeDecision(AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState)
member.summary: Main decision-making method that determines what action the AI should take. Evaluates multiple possible actions and picks the best one.
member.returns: An AI decision containing the chosen action and target.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.EnemyAIBehavior.ExecuteDecision(AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIDecision,AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState)
member.summary: Executes the chosen AI decision by calling appropriate GameManager methods.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.CriticalStrike
member.summary: Critical Strike – Deals 200% ATK to a single enemy. 3-turn cooldown.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.InstantKill
member.summary: Instant Kill – Instantly defeats a target below 15% HP. Deals normal ATK damage otherwise.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.ShadowStrike
member.summary: Shadow Strike – Attacks at range 2 from stealth (raw damage, no DEF reduction).

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.BloodDrain
member.summary: Blood Drain – Drains life from the target: deals ATK damage and heals caster for 30%.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.PoisonBlade
member.summary: Poison Blade – Deals light damage and applies BurningEffect as a stand-in for Poison (to be replaced with PoisonEffect once implemented).

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.AssassinData
member.summary: Assassin – Glass cannon unit. Extremely high ATK with low HP and DEF. Specialises in burst damage, execution, and life steal.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Main
member.summary: Main scene controller that initializes the game systems. Follows the Component-Based Architecture and event-driven communication.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Main.InitializeMenus
member.summary: Initialise the menus and register them with the MenuManager. Ensures that the SettingsManager and MenuManager singletons are available. Uses deferred calls to avoid Godot lifecycle issues. Catches and logs exceptions during initialization. Also checks that the menu container and scenes are valid before proceeding. This method can be overridden in tests to provide mock menus.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Main.CreateMenus
member.summary: Create menu instances - virtual for testing overrides. Default implementation instantiates from PackedScenes. Checks for null references and logs appropriately. Can be overridden in tests to provide mock or test-specific menus.
member.returns: Tuple of (mainMenu, optionsMenu) nodes.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Main.ValidateInitialConditions
member.summary: Validates that the necessary singletons and nodes are available. Logs errors if any required component is missing.
member.returns: True if all conditions are met, false otherwise.

member.summary: Adds the instantiated menus to the menu container.

member.summary: Registers the menus with the MenuManager and shows the main menu.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BaseManager
member.summary: Base class for all manager singletons in the game. Implements the Manager Pattern from your architecture documentation.
member.remarks: This class serves as a base for all manager classes, ensuring that only one instance exists. It provides a common initialization and cleanup mechanism for all managers. Derived classes should implement the Initialize method to set up their specific functionality.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BaseManager._Ready
member.summary: Called when the node is added to the scene tree. Initializes the manager instance and checks for duplicates.
member.remarks: This method is called automatically by Godot when the node is ready. It ensures that only one instance of the manager exists in the scene tree. If a duplicate instance is found, it removes the duplicate.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BaseManager.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the manager instance. This method should be overridden in derived classes to set up specific functionality.
member.remarks: This method is called by the _Ready method to initialize the manager. It should contain the logic necessary to set up the manager's state and functionality. Derived classes must implement this method to provide their specific initialization logic.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BaseManager._ExitTree
member.summary: Called when the node is removed from the scene tree. Cleans up the manager instance and sets it to null.
member.remarks: This method is called automatically by Godot when the node is removed from the scene tree. It ensures that the manager instance is properly cleaned up and set to null. This is important for preventing memory leaks and ensuring that the manager can be re-initialized later if needed.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BaseManager.Cleanup
member.summary: Cleans up the manager instance. This method can be overridden in derived classes to implement specific cleanup logic.
member.remarks: This method is called when the manager is removed from the scene tree. It provides a place for derived classes to implement any necessary cleanup logic, such as disconnecting signals or releasing resources. By default, it does nothing, but derived classes can override it to perform specific cleanup tasks.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.GameManager.MoveUnit(Godot.Vector3I)
member.summary: Moves the currently active unit to the specified cell on the map.
member.param: The target cell position as a (grid coordinates X, Y, Z).
member.remarks: Checks that both _mapSystemContainer and _turnManagerContainer are properly set before performing the move. If valid, the active unit is repositioned in the world based on the given cell coordinates and the map’s cell size.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.GameManager.UseSkill(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem,AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem)
member.summary: Uses a skill from a source unit on a target unit, depending on the skill’s target type.
member.param: The unit that performs the skill.
The main target unit of the skill.
The skill being used, containing information about its target type and effects.
member.remarks: Determines which units are allies or enemies based on the source unit, then applies the skill accordingly depending on its TargetType. If required containers are not initialized, the method prints an error and exits early.

example.code: SkillSystem healSkill = new SkillSystem("Heal", TargetTypes.SingleAlly); gameManager.UseSkill(playerUnit, allyUnit, healSkill);

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.GameManager.CheckUnitsLife(System.Collections.Generic.List{AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem})
member.summary: Sets all units as dead. (The called method verify if the unit HP is equal or less than 0) This is typically used when evaluating defeat conditions or performing a full cleanup of player-controlled units.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.GameManager.CheckWinLoseCondition
member.summary: Evaluates the win/lose conditions based on the number of living units. If no player units remain, the result is a defeat. If no enemy units remain, the result is a victory. Ends the turn manager loop accordingly.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.GameManager.CheckUnitTurnEnd
member.summary: Performs end-of-turn checks for all units.
member.remarks: This method updates the state of all player and enemy units, then evaluates the win/lose conditions. It is typically called at the end of a unit's turn to ensure that deaths, revives, and victory conditions are handled immediately.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager
member.summary: Manages menu navigation and state. Coordinates between different menus following the Manager Pattern.
member.remarks: This class is responsible for showing, hiding, and navigating between menus. It maintains a history of menus for back navigation and provides methods to register and unregister menus. It also emits signals when the current menu changes.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the MenuManager singleton instance. Ensures only one instance exists and sets up the initial state.
member.remarks: This method is called automatically by Godot when the node is ready. It checks for duplicate instances and initializes the menu system. If a duplicate instance is found, it removes the duplicate.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager.SetInstanceForTesting(AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager)
member.summary: FOR TESTING ONLY: Manually sets the singleton instance. This method should only be used in unit tests.
member.param: The instance to set as the singleton.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager.RegisterMenu(System.String,Godot.Control)
member.summary: Registers a menu with the MenuManager. Adds the menu to the internal dictionary and hides it by default.
member.param: The unique name of the menu to register.
The Control instance representing the menu.
member.remarks: This method checks if the menu is already registered to avoid duplicates. If the menu is already registered, it prints an error message and does not add it again. It also connects back signals for navigation menus, such as OptionsMenu, to handle back navigation.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager.UnregisterMenu(System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters a menu from the MenuManager. Removes the menu from the internal dictionary.
member.param: The unique name of the menu to unregister.
member.remarks: This method checks if the menu exists before attempting to remove it. If the menu is currently active, it will hide it before removing.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager.ShowMenu(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Shows a menu by its name. Hides the current menu and shows the specified menu.
member.param: The unique name of the menu to show.
Whether to add the current menu to the history stack for back navigation.
member.remarks: This method checks if the specified menu exists in the registered menus. If it does, it hides the current menu and shows the specified menu. If the current menu is not empty, it adds it to the history stack for back navigation. If the specified menu is not found, it prints an error message.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager.GoBack
member.summary: Goes back to the previous menu in the history stack. If there is no previous menu, it prints a message indicating that.
member.remarks: This method pops the last menu from the history stack and shows it. If the history stack is empty, it prints a message indicating that there is no previous menu to go back to. It does not add the previous menu back to the history stack when going back.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager.ClearHistory
member.summary: Clears the menu history stack. This method removes all entries from the history stack, effectively resetting it.
member.remarks: This method is useful when you want to reset the menu navigation state. It clears the history stack, so there are no previous menus to go back to.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager.GetCurrentMenu
member.summary: Gets the name of the current active menu.
member.returns: The name of the current menu, or null if no menu is active.
member.remarks: This method returns the name of the currently active menu. If no menu is currently active, it returns null. This can be useful for checking the current state of the menu system.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager.IsMenuActive(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a specific menu is currently active.
member.param: The unique name of the menu to check.
member.returns: True if the specified menu is active, otherwise false.
member.remarks: This method checks if the specified menu is currently the active menu. It compares the provided menu name with the current active menu name. This can be useful for UI logic that needs to know if a specific menu is currently displayed.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager
member.summary: Manages game settings and provides centralized access to configuration options. Follows the Manager Pattern from your architecture.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the SettingsManager singleton instance. Loads settings from the JSON file or creates a new default settings object.
member.remarks: This method is called automatically by Godot when the node is ready. It ensures that only one instance of SettingsManager exists and initializes the settings data. If the settings file does not exist, it creates a new default settings object and saves it.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.SaveDefaultInputBindings
member.summary: Saves the default input bindings from project settings before any modifications.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.LoadSettings
member.summary: Loads settings from the JSON file. If the file does not exist, creates a new default settings object.
member.remarks: This method reads the settings from a JSON file located at user://settings.json. If the file is not found, it initializes a new SettingsData object with default values and saves it to create the settings file.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.SaveSettings
member.summary: Saves the current settings to the JSON file.
member.remarks: This method serializes the current settings data to a JSON string and writes it to the user://settings.json file. It handles any exceptions that may occur during the file operations.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.ApplyInputBindings
member.summary: Applies saved input bindings from settings to the InputMap.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.GetInputBinding(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the current input binding for an action.
member.param: The action name to retrieve the binding for.
member.returns: The InputEvent bound to the action, or null if not found.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.SetInputBinding(System.String,Godot.InputEvent)
member.summary: Sets a new input binding for an action and saves the settings. Emits a signal to notify other components of the change.
member.param: The action name to set the binding for.
The InputEvent to bind to the action.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.SerializeInputEvent(Godot.InputEvent)
member.summary: Serializes an InputEvent to a dictionary for JSON storage.
member.returns: A dictionary representing the serialized InputEvent.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.DeserializeInputEvent(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Deserializes an InputEvent from a dictionary.
member.param: The dictionary containing the serialized InputEvent data.
member.returns: The deserialized InputEvent, or null if deserialization failed.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.GetDialogueSize
member.summary: Gets the current dialogue size setting.
member.returns: The dialogue size as a float, defaulting to 1.0f if not set.
member.remarks: This method retrieves the dialogue size from the settings data. If the dialogue size is not set, it returns a default value of 1.0f.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.SetDialogueSize(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the dialogue size and saves the settings. Emits a signal to notify other components of the change.
member.param: The new dialogue size to set.
member.remarks: This method updates the dialogue size in the settings data and saves it to the JSON file. It also emits a SettingsChanged signal to notify other components of the change. The size is clamped between 0.5f and 2.0f to ensure it remains within a reasonable range.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.GetSetting``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Gets a custom setting by key, with an optional default value.
member.typeparam: The type of the setting value.
member.param: The key of the setting to retrieve.
The default value to return if the setting is not found.
member.returns: The setting value if found, otherwise the default value.
member.remarks: This method retrieves a custom setting from the settings data. If the setting is not found, it returns the provided default value. It uses JSON serialization to convert the setting value to the specified type.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.SetSetting``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Sets a custom setting by key and saves the settings. Emits a signal to notify other components of the change.
member.typeparam: The type of the setting value.
member.param: The key of the setting to set.
The value to set for the setting.
member.remarks: This method updates a custom setting in the settings data and saves it to the JSON file. It also emits a SettingsChanged signal to notify other components of the change. The value is serialized to JSON format before being stored.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager.ResetToDefaults
member.summary: Resets all settings to their default values.
member.remarks: This method clears the current settings and initializes a new SettingsData object with default values. It saves the new settings to the JSON file and emits a SettingsChanged signal to notify other components.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager
member.summary: Manages the turn-based battle flow between player and enemy units. Handles turn order, state transitions, and async waiting for unit actions.
member.remarks: This class acts as the core of the turn-based combat loop. It determines which unit acts next, triggers player input events, and handles asynchronous waiting for both player and AI actions.

member.name: P:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance of the . Ensures only one instance exists in the scene tree.

member.name: E:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.OnPlayerTurn
member.summary: Triggered when the player's turn begins.

member.name: E:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.OnPlayerTurnEnd
member.summary: Triggered when the player's turn ends.

member.name: E:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.OnEnemyTurnEnd
member.summary: Triggered when the enemy's turn ends

member.name: E:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.OnCurrentTurnEnd
member.summary: Triggered when the current turn ends.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the TurnManager singleton instance. Ensures only one instance exists and sets up the initial state.
member.remarks: This method is called automatically by Godot when the node is ready. It checks for duplicate instances and initializes the game system. If a duplicate instance is found, it removes the duplicate.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.ProcessTurn
member.summary: Main asynchronous turn processing loop. Handles turn progression for all units in the battle.
member.remarks: This method runs indefinitely while the battle is ongoing. It alternates between player and enemy turns, invoking events and awaiting actions.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.WaitForEnemyAction(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem)
member.summary: Executes enemy AI logic asynchronously.
member.param: The enemy unit performing the action.
member.returns: A task that completes when the enemy finishes its action.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.SetAIManager(AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.EnemyAIManager)
member.summary: Sets the reference to the EnemyAIManager instance.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.InitializeTurnOrder(System.Collections.Generic.List{AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem},System.Collections.Generic.List{AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem})
member.summary: Initializes the turn order list based on all participating units.
member.remarks: The order is determined by each unit's value, sorted from highest to lowest.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager.StartBattle
member.summary: Starts the turn-based battle loop asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the battle loop’s lifetime.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.BattleInputSystem
member.summary: Central system responsible for handling player inputs during battle phases.

remarks.para: captures and interprets user actions (keyboard and mouse) related to combat gameplay, including:

item.description: Moving a unit or selecting a target on the map

remarks.para: This system acts as a single entry point for battle-related inputs and communicates with other game systems through Godot signals.
The class follows a singleton-like pattern to ensure that only one active instance exists within the scene tree.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.BattleInputSystem.OnPassTurnPressedEventHandler
member.summary: Emitted when the player presses the "pass turn" input action.
member.remarks: Used by the to indicate that the player has chosen to skip their current turn and let control pass to the next entity.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.BattleInputSystem.OnMoveUnitOrSelectTargetPressedEventHandler
member.summary: Emitted when the player clicks on a map cell to move a unit or select a target.
member.param: The target cell position on the grid, in map coordinates ().
member.remarks: This signal notifies systems responsible for unit movement or selection that the player has requested a move or target action.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.BattleInputSystem.OnSelectedSkillPressedEventHandler
member.summary: Emitted when the player selects a specific skill.
member.param: The numerical identifier of the selected skill.
member.remarks: Used by the combat system or skill management system to determine which skill the player intends to use. Skills are indexed from 0 to 4.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.BattleInputSystem.OnSelectMovePressedEventHandler
member.summary: Emitted when the player selects the move action
member.remarks: This signal is used to notify systems handling unit commands that the player has initiated a move selection.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.BattleInputSystem._Ready
member.summary: Called when the node is added to the scene tree. Initializes the instance and checks for duplicates.
member.remarks: This method is called automatically by Godot when the node is ready. It ensures that only one instance of the exists in the scene tree. If a duplicate instance is found, it removes the duplicate.

member.summary: Initializes the instance This method should be overridden in derived classes to set up specific functionality.
member.remarks: This method is called by the _Ready method to initialize the map. It should contain the logic necessary to set up the map's state and functionality. Derived classes must implement this method to provide their specific initialization logic.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem
member.summary: Base class for all skills available in the game.
member.remarks: This class defines the common properties and behaviors of every skill, such as its cost, cooldown, range, type, and targeting logic. Specific skills should inherit from this class and implement the method.

member.summary: The name of the skill.

member.summary: The total cooldown duration (in turns) before the skill can be reused.

member.summary: The remaining cooldown (in turns) before the skill becomes available again.

members.member:
Base class for any entity that can receive and manage s. Provides default implementations for applying, removing, and querying effects.
/// The type of target this effect system is applied to (e.g., UnitSystem, CellInformation).

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.EffectTarget`1._activeEffects
member.summary: Internal list storing all active status effects on this target.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IEffectTarget`1
member.summary: Represents any entity that can receive and manage s.
member.typeparam: The concrete type of the target, such as or .
member.remarks: Implementing this interface allows an object to have status effects applied, removed, queried, and iterated over. It is used by to manage effects for multiple types of targets in a generic way.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IEffectTarget`1.ApplyEffect(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffect{`0})
member.summary: Applies a status effect to this target.

member.summary: Removes a status effect from this target.

member.summary: Checks whether this target currently has an active status effect of the specified type.
member.typeparam: The type of to check for.
member.returns: true if the effect is present on this target; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IEffectTarget`1.GetActiveEffects
member.summary: Retrieves all status effects currently active on this target.
member.returns: A list of representing all active effects.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IStatusEffect
member.summary: Empty interface to be able to contain any status effect as the actual abstract class cannot take object as the TTarget

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IStatusEffectBehavior
member.summary: Defines the behavior contract for status effects applied to an entity.

remarks.para: is implemented by classes that react to status effect events such as damage, healing, stat modifiers, control effects, or revival.
Each method is called by the status effect or combat system when a specific effect-related event occurs, allowing custom logic to be executed (visual feedback, stat updates, triggers, etc.).

member.param: The type of modifier responsible for the damage (e.g. Flat, Percent).

member.summary: Called when a revive effect is applied to the entity.
member.param: The type of modifier responsible for the revive effect.

member.summary: Base class for all status effects that can be applied to an .

member.remarks: This class provides core properties and methods for a status effect, including stacking behavior, duration management, and hooks for when the effect is applied, removed, or updated each turn.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffectSystem
member.summary: Manages the lifecycle and application of s for all tracked targets in the game, including units and map cells.
member.remarks: This system keeps track of every target that has active status effects, applies new effects, handles stacking, and processes end-of-turn updates. Targets must implement and be either a or a .

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffectSystem._allTargets
member.summary: List of all targets currently having effects.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffectSystem.RefreshTargetEffectsOnTurnEnd``1(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IEffectTarget{``0})
member.summary: Updates all active status effects on the given target at the end of a turn.
member.typeparam: The concrete type of the effect target (e.g. or ).
member.param: The target whose active instances should be updated.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffectSystem.ApplyEffect``1(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IEffectTarget{``0},AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffect{``0})
member.summary: Applies a new status effect to the given target, or stacks it if already present.
member.typeparam: The type of the target, must be either or .
member.param: The target on which to apply the status effect.
member.remarks: If the target already has an effect of the same type and it is stackable, the effect will be stacked instead of being applied again.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffectSystem.ProcessUnitTurnEnd(AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IEffectTarget{AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem})
member.summary: Processes end-of-turn updates for a single target.
member.param: The target whose status effects should be updated.
member.remarks: Each status effect has its method called, and expired effects are removed automatically. If a target has no more active effects, it is removed from the tracking list.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffectSystem.ProcessTurnEnd
member.summary: Processes end-of-turn updates for all tracked targets.
member.remarks: Iterates over all tracked targets in and updates their status effects. Expired effects are removed, and targets with no remaining effects are removed from the tracking list. Only targets of type are processed by this method.

member.remarks: This class provides fundamental behavior for all combat units, including: - Base stats (HP, attack, defense, etc.) - Turn logic (HasPlayed) - Movement logic (BFS pathfinding in 3D) - Integration with and

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem._ExitTree
member.summary: Called when the node is removed from the scene tree. Cleans up the unit instance and sets it to null.
member.remarks: This method is called automatically by Godot when the node is removed from the scene tree. It ensures that the unit instance is properly cleaned up and set to null. This is important for preventing memory leaks and ensuring that the manager can be re-initialized later if needed.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem.Cleanup
member.summary: Cleans up the unit instance. This method can be overridden in derived classes to implement specific cleanup logic.
member.remarks: This method is called when the unit is removed from the scene tree. It provides a place for derived classes to implement any necessary cleanup logic, such as disconnecting signals or releasing resources. By default, it does nothing, but derived classes can override it to perform specific cleanup tasks.

member.summary: Calculates all possible movement tiles for this unit based on its range and position.
member.param: The map to evaluate movement on.
member.returns: A list of reachable coordinates (x, y, z).
member.remarks: This method uses a Breadth-First Search (BFS) algorithm to evaluate all valid moves considering walkable tiles and vertical traversal (e.g. stairs, cliffs).

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.MainMenu
member.summary: Main menu controller that handles user interactions and navigation. Implements the Manager Pattern from your architecture documentation.
member.remarks: This class is responsible for displaying the main menu and handling user input. It interacts with the MenuManager to show or hide menus as needed.

member.summary: FOR TESTING ONLY: Sets a custom MenuManager instance. This allows tests to inject a test double without relying on the singleton.

member.summary: Gets the MenuManager instance, either from override (testing) or singleton (production).
member.returns: The MenuManager instance to use.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.MainMenu._Ready
member.summary: Called when the node is added to the scene tree. Initializes the menu and connects signals for button interactions.
member.remarks: This method is called automatically by Godot when the node is ready. It sets up the initial state of the menu and connects button signals to their handlers.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.MainMenu.OnOptionsButtonButtonUp
member.summary: Handles the "Options" button click event. Navigates to the options menu.
member.remarks: This method is connected to the Options button's "button_up" signal. It triggers the options menu display by calling the MenuManager.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.MainMenu.OnExitButtonButtonUp
member.summary: Handles the "Exit" button click event. Exits the game application.
member.remarks: This method is connected to the Exit button's "button_up" signal. It calls the Godot engine's quit method to close the application.

member.summary: Gets a user-friendly name for the given input event.
member.param: The input event to get the name for.
member.returns: A string representing the input event.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.CreateActionList
member.summary: Creates the list of input action buttons dynamically.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.OnInputButtonPressed(Godot.Button,System.String)
member.summary: Handles input button press to start remapping.
member.param: The action associated with the button.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu._Input(Godot.InputEvent)
member.summary: Captures input for remapping actions.
member.remarks: This method listens for input events when remapping is active. It updates the binding in SettingsManager and refreshes the button display. It ignores certain inputs like Escape or specific joypad buttons to prevent unwanted bindings.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.CreateNotifUnbound(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a notification for unbound actions.
member.remarks: This method instantiates a notification UI element to inform the user that an action has been unbound. The notification is displayed for 5 seconds before being removed. Multiple notifications are stacked vertically.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.PlaceNotifUnbound
member.summary: Places unbound notifications on the screen.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.UpdateActionList(Godot.Button,Godot.InputEvent)
member.summary: Updates the input label for a specific button.
member.param: The new input event to display.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.ConnectSignals
member.summary: Connects signals from UI elements and SettingsManager.
member.remarks: This method sets up event handlers for UI interactions and settings changes. It ensures that changes in the UI are reflected in the SettingsManager and vice versa.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.OnInputBindingChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Handles input binding changes from SettingsManager.
member.param: The action whose binding has changed.
member.remarks: This method refreshes the action list to reflect updated bindings. It ensures that the UI stays in sync with the underlying settings.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.InitializeUI
member.summary: Initializes the UI elements and sets up initial values from settings.
member.remarks: This method sets up the dialogue size slider with proper min/max values and step. It also updates the preview text and dialogue size label to reflect current settings. If SettingsManager is not available, it logs an error and returns early.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.OnDialogueSizeChanged(System.Double)
member.summary: Handles the dialogue size slider value change event.
member.param: The new value of the dialogue size slider (0.5 to 2.0).
member.remarks: This method updates the dialogue size in the SettingsManager and refreshes the UI preview. The value is cast to float for compatibility with the SettingsManager API. Updates both the label display and the preview text scaling.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.OnDialogueSizeSettingChanged(System.Single)
member.summary: Handles external dialogue size setting changes from the SettingsManager.
member.param: The new dialogue size value from the settings manager.
member.remarks: This method updates the UI when the setting changes from an external source. It prevents infinite loops by checking if the slider value differs significantly from the new size. Updates both the slider position and the preview elements.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.UpdateDialogueSizeLabel(System.Single)
member.summary: Updates the dialogue size label with the current size as a percentage.
member.remarks: The size is converted to a percentage (50% to 200%) and displayed in the label. The value is rounded to the nearest integer for clean display.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.UpdatePreview
member.summary: Updates the preview text and dialogue size based on the current settings.
member.remarks: This method adjusts the font size of the preview text and scales the preview dialogue control. It uses the current dialogue size from the SettingsManager to provide real-time preview. The font size is calculated as 18 pixels multiplied by the current scale factor. Both text font size and control scaling are updated to show the visual impact.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.OnResetPressed
member.summary: Handles the reset button press event by showing a confirmation dialog.
member.remarks: This method shows a confirmation dialog before resetting settings to prevent accidental resets. The actual reset operation is performed only after user confirmation.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.ShowResetConfirmation
member.summary: Shows a confirmation dialog for resetting all settings to default values.
member.remarks: This method creates an AcceptDialog with custom buttons for confirmation. If the user confirms, it calls SettingsManager.ResetToDefaults(). The dialog is properly cleaned up after use to prevent memory leaks. Provides both "Reset" and "Cancel" options for user choice.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.OnBackPressed
member.summary: Handles the back button press event by emitting a navigation signal.
member.remarks: This method emits the BackRequested signal to notify the MenuManager or other listening components that the user wants to return to the previous menu. Follows the event-driven architecture pattern for menu navigation.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.ShowMenu
member.summary: Shows the options menu with a fade-in animation effect.
member.remarks: This method makes the menu visible and animates it from transparent to fully opaque. Uses a Godot Tween for smooth visual transition over 0.3 seconds. The menu starts completely transparent and fades to full visibility.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu.HideMenu
member.summary: Hides the options menu with a fade-out animation effect.
member.remarks: This method animates the menu from fully visible to transparent, then hides it. Uses a Godot Tween for smooth visual transition over 0.3 seconds. The menu is actually hidden after the fade-out animation completes. Provides a polished user experience with smooth transitions.

member.name: M:AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu._ExitTree
member.summary: Cleanup when the node exits the tree.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures
member.summary: Provides shared data structures and enumerations used across the game systems.

remarks.para: centralizes common enumerations and value types related to gameplay logic, including combat resolution, status effects, targeting rules, unit archetypes, and turn management.
This static class is intended to act as a single source of truth for core gameplay definitions, ensuring consistency and reducing coupling between systems.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.CellType
member.summary: Enumeration of every cell type available in the game.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.ClickOnMapContext
member.summary: Defines the current interaction mode when clicking on the map.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.ClickOnMapContext.MoveUnit
member.summary: The player is selecting a cell to move a unit.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.ClickOnMapContext.SelectUnitTarget
member.summary: The player is selecting a unit or target cell for a skill.

member.summary: Defines the type of effect applied by a skill or status effect.

member.summary: Represents the outcome of a battle.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.GameOutcome.Ongoing
member.summary: The battle is ongoing; no winner yet.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.GameOutcome.Victory
member.summary: The player has won the battle.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.GameOutcome.Defeat
member.summary: The player has lost the battle.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.MagicType
member.summary: Represents the elemental type of a skill.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.ModifierType
member.summary: Defines how a numerical modifier affects a value.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.StatTypeWithModifier
member.summary: Represents a stat that can receive modifiers.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.TargetTypes
member.summary: Defines the targeting pattern of a skill.

member.name: T:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.TurnState
member.summary: Defines the possible turn states in the battle system.

member.name: F:AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.TurnState.PlayerTurn
member.summary: The player's turn to act.

member.summary: The enemy's turn to act.

member.summary: State that inform the game is finished.

member.summary: Represents the different unit archetypes in the game.
